methods.description: Procedure for excavating sediment, screen-washing it, and manually picking fossil remains to recover paleontological material.

steps.description: The described material was recovered from ~250 kg of sandy silt excavated in the locality Tepe Alagöz during summer of 2008.
steps.searchable_summary: Excavate sediment from a specific geological locality.

steps.description: The sediment was processed following a conventional screen-washing procedure using a set of stable sieves with the small mesh size of 0.5 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform screen-washing on excavated sediment using specific sieve size.

steps.description: The fossil remains were picked manually in the laboratory of Comenius University.
steps.searchable_summary: Manually pick fossil remains from processed sediment.

methods.description: Procedure for measuring dimensions of recovered fossil remains using a calibrated micrometer eyepiece on a stereomicroscope.

steps.description: Measurements were made using a calibrated micrometer eyepiece on the Leica MZ75 stereomicroscope.
steps.searchable_summary: Use a calibrated micrometer eyepiece on a stereomicroscope for measurement.

steps.description: All dimensions are given in millimeters [mm].

methods.description: Procedures for photographing rodent teeth using Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) and drawing lagomorph teeth using a camera lucida.

steps.description: Rodent teeth were photographed using an analytical SEM microscope Hitachi VP-SEM S-3700N.
steps.searchable_summary: Photograph rodent teeth using a scanning electron microscope (SEM).

steps.description: and lagomorph teeth were drawn using a camera lucida mounted on the stereomicroscope.
steps.searchable_summary: Draw lagomorph teeth using a camera lucida on a stereomicroscope.
outputs: camera lucida drawings of lagomorph teeth
